# How to Install and Load `menstrualcycleR`

To install and load the `menstrualcycleR` package, follow these steps:

1.  Install the `remotes` package (if not already installed):
    `install.packages("remotes")`

2.  Install `menstrualcycleR` from GitHub

`remotes::install_github("eisenlohrmoullab/menstrualcycleR")`

3.  Load the package

[`library(menstrualcycleR)`](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR)

To utilize the shinyapp, visit:
<https://menstrualcycledata.shinyapps.io/shiny/>

For a tutorial on using `menstrualcycleR` visit:
<https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/articles/menstrualcycleR-overview.html>

For a history of changes by version, see the changelog:
<https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/news/index.html>

![](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0502430c-75d9-4fdb-9b59-f3bafd16bb9c)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`cycle_plot()`](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/reference/cycle_plot.md)
  : Plot Symptom Data Across the Menstrual Cycle
- [`cycle_plot_individual()`](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/reference/cycle_plot_individual.md)
  : Generate Cycle-Specific Plots and Summary Data for a Given ID
- [`cycledata`](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/reference/cycledata.md)
  : Example longitudinal daily dataset with cycle measures
- [`cycledata_check()`](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/reference/cycledata_check.md)
  : Analyze Non-Missing Symptom Data by Cycle Phase
- [`launch_app()`](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/reference/launch_app.md)
  : Launch the Menstrual Cycle Shiny App
- [`pacts_scaling()`](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/reference/pacts_scaling.md)
  : Phase-Aligned Cycle Time Scaling (PACTS)
- [`summary_ovulation()`](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/reference/summary_ovulation.md)
  : Summarize Ovulation Confirmation and Imputation

### All vignettes

- [Getting Started with menstrualcycleR and Phase-Aligned Cycle Time
  Scaling
  (PACTS)](https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/articles/menstrualcycleR-overview.md):
